summary: The completed batch 06 file incorporates fresh replacement items for the seven questions previously flagged as duplicate-angle overlaps. With those replacements merged into the validated base, the batch is now suitable to keep as a single complete approved-content file for downstream use.

hard_corrections.issue: Earlier cease-and-desist administrative-penalty amount was corrected in the prior validation pass before this completed file was assembled.

recommended_next_step: Use question_bank_validated_batch_06_complete.json as the kept batch-06 artifact and place this matching report alongside it when you upload approved batches in one pass.
